compiled_state.title: RED test: gate-escalation-router.py behavioral tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/scripts/test_gate_escalation_router.py with pytest behavioral tests. Pipes gate signal JSON array via subprocess stdin.

Tests (12 cases):
1. test_zero_signals — empty/all-false -> route:auto-fix
2. test_one_primary_signal -> route:dialog
3. test_two_primary_signals -> route:escalate
4. test_three_primary_signals -> route:escalate
5. test_complex_override — --complex -> route:escalate regardless
6. test_complex_with_zero_signals -> route:escalate
7. test_modifier_not_counted — modifier triggered:true not counted as primary
8. test_modifier_enriches_dialog — primary + modifier -> dialog with annotation context
9. test_dialog_format — route:dialog has question_count and signal details
10. test_escalate_format — route:escalate includes all evidence
11. test_missing_gate_defaults — partial array -> no error, count present only
12. test_emits_routing_json — output has route, signal_count, dialog_context

Test approach: subprocess.run() with JSON stdin, optional --complex flag, assert on stdout JSON.

.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py: tests/scripts/test_gate_escalation_router.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test_gate_escalation_router.py
- [ ] At least 12 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/scripts/test_gate_escalation_router.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 12)}'
- [ ] Tests use subprocess
  Verify: grep -q 'subprocess' tests/scripts/test_gate_escalation_router.py
- [ ] .test-index entry (source path as key)
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/scripts/gate-escalation-router.py' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: AC amendment (review): test_modifier_enriches_dialog (case 8) should assert dialog_context includes the modifier's 'evidence' field value — NOT 'annotation'. Use 'evidence' consistently per gate-signal-schema.md contract. Also add test_malformed_json_input: pipe invalid JSON -> route:auto-fix (fail-open, not crash).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for gate-escalation-router.py written — 14 tests RED
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
